note: Day 30 (Monday). First weekday after post-campaign Saturday hold. All Batch 1-4 sequences confirmed complete as of 2026-04-24 (fu_049 = final campaign send). No leads in Day 3-6 LinkedIn eligibility window. No Batch 5 Ryedale data received — no new leads. Warm pipeline leads 1/3/22 (Tom/Claire/Rob): final close emails assumed sent 2026-04-25 (Friday). Now Day 2 of 7-day buffer — LinkedIn blocked until 2026-05-02 (Saturday) / 2026-05-04 (Monday preferred). IMAP gap: 23 days — CRITICAL. Monday is highest-priority day for Batch 5 data return. If data arrives today: BRAIN writes copy same day → sends Monday afternoon / Tuesday 2026-04-28 → LinkedIn window opens Thursday 2026-05-01.
orchestrator_status: NOT FOUND — src/outlocal/linkedin/orchestrator.py does not exist. All execution is manual (HANDS). This has not existed at any point in the 30-day campaign. Consider scaffolding for Batch 5 to automate Day 3 LinkedIn flag in daily_signals.json.
imap_gap_warning: CRITICAL — 23 days without confirmed IMAP check (last confirmed: 2026-04-04). Any lead in the warm pipeline (1/3/22) may have replied to the final close email. HANDS: full IMAP sweep is the single most urgent operational action before any other outreach today.

eligibility_check.rule: LinkedIn connection window: Day 3 to Day 6 inclusive after initial email, before Day-7 follow-up fires
eligibility_check.reason_no_active_leads: All Batch 1-4 leads have completed their Day-14 breakup step (sequences assumed complete 2026-04-24). No lead is in Days 3-6. No Batch 5 leads exist. Warm pipeline leads 1/3/22 are BLOCKED — email conversation active (7-day buffer post final-close runs until 2026-05-02).
eligibility_check.next_eligible_leads: Batch 5 Ryedale leads — if data arrives today (Monday 2026-04-27) and initial emails fire today or Tuesday 2026-04-28, LinkedIn window opens Thursday 2026-05-01 (Day 3 after Monday sends) or Friday 2026-05-02 (Day 3 after Tuesday sends).

leads_emailed_3_plus_days_no_reply.note: All Batch 1-4 leads (~60) were emailed 3+ days ago. However, the LinkedIn eligibility window (Day 3-6) has expired for all of them — sequences are complete at Day-14 breakup. Being emailed 3+ days ago is a necessary but not sufficient condition. The Day 3-6 window closes when the Day-7 follow-up fires. All Batch 1-4 leads are past Day-14 breakup.
leads_emailed_3_plus_days_no_reply.warm_pipeline_exception: Leads 1/3/22 (Tom/Claire/Rob) DID reply. They are in active close email conversations (INTERESTED). LinkedIn BLOCKED while email conversation is open and within 7-day post-close buffer.

no_queries_reason: Three-part block: (1) All Batch 1-4 sequences complete — LinkedIn window (Day 3-6) definitively closed for all ~60 leads. (2) No Batch 5 Ryedale data received — no new leads to generate queries for. (3) Warm pipeline leads 1/3/22 still within 7-day post-close buffer (Day 2 of 7) — LinkedIn blocked until 2026-05-02.

monday_priority_note.highest_urgency: Batch 5 Ryedale data return. If data arrives today: BRAIN writes copy immediately. First sends Monday afternoon (if data arrives before 14:00) or Tuesday morning. LinkedIn window opens Thursday 2026-05-01.
monday_priority_note.campaign_gap_status: 31 days since last initial send (2026-03-28). Every additional day without Batch 5 is a day without prospecting. This is the longest prospecting gap of the campaign.
monday_priority_note.imap_priority: Full IMAP sweep before any other action. 23-day gap. Warm pipeline leads 1/3/22 may have replied to final close emails sent Friday.

warm_pipeline_linkedin_option.pre_generated_notes: All three notes pre-generated in linkedin_connection_notes.json warm_pipeline_nurture_notes section — ready for dispatch.
warm_pipeline_linkedin_option.rule: If any of these three leads reply to the final close email at any point before LinkedIn notes are sent: LinkedIn is permanently blocked for that lead. HANDS: IMAP sweep before sending any note.

batch_5_linkedin_strategy.status: READY — templates and rules prepared. Awaiting Batch 5 Ryedale data. CRITICAL: 31-day gap since last initial send.
batch_5_linkedin_strategy.confirmed_winner_sectors: SSL leads with full names — 3/3 INTERESTED leads used SSL+PAS+first-name-subject. Prioritise high-LinkedIn sectors: solicitors, estate agents, B&Bs, restaurants, care providers.
batch_5_linkedin_strategy.first_name_only_rule: Skip LinkedIn if first name only AND low-LinkedIn trade (electrician, plumber, roofer, joiner, builder). Attempt if first name only AND high-LinkedIn sector (care, leisure, solicitor, accountant, restaurant owner).
batch_5_linkedin_strategy.post_reference_priority: HANDS: check each profile for recent posts (60 days) BEFORE sending any note. post_reference achieves 3-4x higher acceptance rate. Execute search, post-check, and send in ONE SESSION on Day 3-6.
batch_5_linkedin_strategy.window: Day 3 to Day 6 inclusive after initial email. This is a narrow window — execution must happen same-session.
batch_5_linkedin_strategy.mandatory_same_session_protocol: BRAIN will flag Day 3 LinkedIn send day explicitly in daily_signals.json as a MANDATORY action item. HANDS must complete in under 2 hours of BRAIN run. Write linkedin_profiles.json immediately after each session.
batch_5_linkedin_strategy.weekend_rule: If Day 3-6 falls on Saturday or Sunday: hold to Monday morning. Exception: if Day 6 is Sunday and Day 7 fires Monday — send Sunday 18:00+.

query_templates_ready_for_batch_5.note: Skip if first name only — insufficient to identify correct profile

2. Batch 5 Ryedale scrape data — if in hand: return data file NOW. BRAIN writes copy today. Every hour of delay is a prospecting hour lost.
3. Confirm final close emails for leads 1/3/22 (Tom/Claire/Rob) were sent Friday 2026-04-25. If NOT sent: send today (Monday). Log in CHANGELOG.md with timestamp.
4. Confirm fu_046-049 send status in CHANGELOG.md if not already done.
5. Confirm fu_036-045 send status in CHANGELOG.md. If any not sent: send today (borderline day 16-17, still valid breakups).
6. Blocked leads 49/51/53/54 — unblocking actions: Companies House (49), phone call (51 — weekday OK), Rightmove/Zoopla (53), info@ (54).
